stemHtml:
Position NDB 55°10’N, 012°55’E
DR Position 54°53’N, 009°58’E
Magnetic variation: 10°W
The NDB on the RMI reads 090°. The position line has to be plotted on a Lamberts conformal chart with standard parallels at 40°N and 48°N.

Calculate the direction (T) of the bearing to be plotted from the NDB.
